239                 GROUP BY fact_type
240             ),
241             distinct_calls AS (
242                 SELECT
243                     fact_type,
244                     record_id,
245                     MAX(input_tokens) AS input_tokens,
246                     MAX(cached_input_tokens) AS cached_input_tokens,
247                     MAX(uncached_input_tokens) AS uncached_input_tokens,
248                     MAX(output_tokens) AS output_tokens,
249                     MAX(reasoning_output_tokens) AS reasoning_output_tokens,
250                     MAX(total_tokens) AS total_tokens,
251                     MAX(cache_ratio) AS cache_ratio,
252                     MAX(event_timestamp) AS event_timestamp
253                 FROM scoped
254                 GROUP BY fact_type, record_id
255             ),
256             call_sums AS (
257                 SELECT
258                     fact_type,
259                     coalesce(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS associated_input_tokens,
260                     coalesce(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0) AS associated_cached_input_tokens,
261                     coalesce(SUM(uncached_input_tokens), 0)
262                         AS associated_uncached_input_tokens,
263                     coalesce(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS associated_output_tokens,
264                     coalesce(SUM(reasoning_output_tokens), 0)
265                         AS associated_reasoning_output_tokens,
266                     coalesce(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS associated_total_tokens,
267                     AVG(cache_ratio) AS avg_cache_ratio,
268                     MAX(total_tokens) AS largest_call_tokens,
269                     MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp
270                 FROM distinct_calls
271                 GROUP BY fact_type
272             )
273             SELECT
274                 type_counts.fact_type,
275                 type_counts.occurrences,
276                 type_counts.associated_calls,
277                 type_counts.fact_names,
278                 call_sums.associated_input_tokens,
279                 call_sums.associated_cached_input_tokens,
280                 call_sums.associated_uncached_input_tokens,
281                 call_sums.associated_output_tokens,
282                 call_sums.associated_reasoning_output_tokens,
283                 call_sums.associated_total_tokens,
284                 call_sums.avg_cache_ratio,
285                 call_sums.largest_call_tokens,
286                 call_sums.latest_event_timestamp,
287                 (
288                     SELECT s2.fact_name
289                     FROM scoped AS s2
290                     WHERE s2.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
291                     GROUP BY s2.fact_name
292                     ORDER BY SUM(s2.event_count) DESC, SUM(s2.uncached_input_tokens) DESC
293                     LIMIT 1
294                 ) AS top_fact_name
295             FROM type_counts
296             JOIN call_sums ON call_sums.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
297             ORDER BY {sort_map[sort]} {direction_sql},
298                 associated_total_tokens DESC,
299                 type_counts.fact_type
300             {limit_clause}
301             """,
302             query_params,
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

40     rows = conn.execute(
41         f"""
42         WITH tool_counts AS (
43             SELECT
44                 record_id,
45                 COUNT(*) AS tool_call_count,
46                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes
47             FROM tool_calls
48             GROUP BY record_id
49         ),
50         command_counts AS (
51             SELECT
52                 record_id,
53                 COUNT(*) AS command_run_count,
54                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
55                 SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_command_count
56             FROM command_runs
57             GROUP BY record_id
58         ),
59         file_counts AS (
60             SELECT
61                 record_id,
62                 COUNT(*) AS file_event_count,
63                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_read_count,
64                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_write_count
65             FROM file_events
66             GROUP BY record_id
67         )
68         SELECT
69             u.record_id,
70             u.session_id,
71             u.thread_key,
72             u.thread_name,
73             u.parent_thread_name,
74             u.event_timestamp,
75             u.model,
76             u.effort,

79             u.total_tokens,

84             u.reasoning_output_tokens,
85             u.model_context_window,
86             u.context_window_percent,
87             COALESCE(tc.tool_call_count, 0) AS tool_call_count,
88             COALESCE(tc.tool_output_size_bytes, 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes,
89             COALESCE(cc.command_run_count, 0) AS command_run_count,
90             COALESCE(cc.command_output_size_bytes, 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
91             COALESCE(cc.failed_command_count, 0) AS failed_command_count,
92             COALESCE(fc.file_event_count, 0) AS file_event_count,
93             COALESCE(fc.file_read_count, 0) AS file_read_count,
94             COALESCE(fc.file_write_count, 0) AS file_write_count
95         FROM usage_events u
96         LEFT JOIN tool_counts tc ON tc.record_id = u.record_id
97         LEFT JOIN command_counts cc ON cc.record_id = u.record_id
98         LEFT JOIN file_counts fc ON fc.record_id = u.record_id
99         {where_sql}
100         ORDER BY u.total_tokens DESC, u.uncached_input_tokens DESC, u.event_timestamp DESC, u.record_id ASC
101         """,

34     rows = conn.execute(
35         f"""
36         WITH filtered AS (
37             SELECT
38                 fe.file_event_key,
39                 fe.record_id,
40                 fe.operation,
41                 fe.path_hash,
42                 fe.path_basename,
43                 fe.path_extension,
44                 fe.path_identity,
45                 u.thread_key,
46                 u.thread_name,
47                 u.session_id,
48                 u.event_timestamp,
49                 u.total_tokens
50             FROM file_events fe
51             JOIN usage_events u ON u.record_id = fe.record_id
52             {where_sql}
53         ),
54         sequenced AS (
55             SELECT
56                 filtered.*,
57                 LAG(path_hash) OVER (
58                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
59                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, record_id, file_event_key
60                 ) AS previous_path_hash
61             FROM filtered
62         )
63         SELECT
64             path_hash,
65             MIN(path_identity) AS path_identity,
66             MIN(path_basename) AS path_basename,
67             MIN(path_extension) AS path_extension,
68             COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
69             SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS read_count,
70             SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
71                 AS write_count,
72             SUM(CASE WHEN operation NOT IN ('read', 'modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
73                 AS other_operation_count,
74             COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS call_count,
75             COUNT(DISTINCT thread_key) AS thread_count,
76             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
77             COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
78             SUM(CASE WHEN previous_path_hash = path_hash THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
79                 AS adjacent_retouch_count,
80             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_seen_at,
81             MAX(event_timestamp) AS last_seen_at
82         FROM sequenced
83         GROUP BY path_hash
84         HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?
85         ORDER BY
86             read_count DESC,
87             adjacent_retouch_count DESC,
88             occurrences DESC,
89             total_tokens DESC,
90             last_seen_at DESC
91         """,
92         [*params, normalized_min],

79         ),
80         sequenced AS (
81             SELECT
82                 filtered.*,
83                 LAG(command_root) OVER (
84                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
85                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, line_start, record_id, command_run_key
86                 ) AS previous_command_root,
87                 LAG(command_label) OVER (
88                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
89                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, line_start, record_id, command_run_key
90                 ) AS previous_command_label
91             FROM filtered
92         )
93         SELECT
94             command_root,
95             MIN(command_label) AS sample_command_label,
96             COUNT(DISTINCT command_label) AS distinct_label_count,
97             COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
98             COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS call_count,
99             COUNT(DISTINCT thread_key) AS thread_count,
100             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
101             COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
102             COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS output_size_bytes,
103             SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(exit_code, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count,
104             SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(exit_code, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_count,
105             SUM(CASE WHEN command_root = previous_command_root THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
106                 AS adjacent_root_repeat_count,
107             SUM(CASE WHEN command_label = previous_command_label THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
108                 AS adjacent_label_repeat_count,
109             COUNT(DISTINCT retry_group) AS retry_group_count,
110             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_seen_at,
111             MAX(event_timestamp) AS last_seen_at
112         FROM sequenced
113         GROUP BY command_root
114         HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?
115         ORDER BY
116             failure_count DESC,
117             adjacent_root_repeat_count DESC,
118             occurrences DESC,
119             total_tokens DESC,
120             last_seen_at DESC
121         """,

205     conn.execute(
206         f"""
207         INSERT INTO thread_summaries (
208             thread_key,
209             is_archived_scope,
210             thread_label,
211             first_event_timestamp,
212             latest_event_timestamp,
213             call_count,
214             session_count,
215             input_tokens,
216             cached_input_tokens,
217             uncached_input_tokens,
218             output_tokens,
219             reasoning_output_tokens,
220             total_tokens,
221             estimated_cost_usd,
222             usage_credits,
223             avg_cache_ratio,
224             max_context_window_percent,
225             max_recommendation_score,
226             primary_recommendation,
227             call_initiator_summary,
228             archived_call_count,
229             updated_at
230         )
231         SELECT
232             {thread_key_expr} AS thread_key,
233             ? AS is_archived_scope,
234             coalesce(max(thread_name), max(parent_thread_name), max(session_id)) AS thread_label,
235             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_event_timestamp,
236             MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp,
237             COUNT(*) AS call_count,
238             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
239             coalesce(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS input_tokens,
240             coalesce(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0) AS cached_input_tokens,
241             coalesce(SUM(uncached_input_tokens), 0) AS uncached_input_tokens,
242             coalesce(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS output_tokens,
243             coalesce(SUM(reasoning_output_tokens), 0) AS reasoning_output_tokens,
244             coalesce(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
245             NULL AS estimated_cost_usd,
246             NULL AS usage_credits,
247             coalesce(AVG(cache_ratio), 0) AS avg_cache_ratio,
248             coalesce(MAX(context_window_percent), 0) AS max_context_window_percent,
249             coalesce(MAX(
250                 CASE
251                     WHEN context_window_percent >= 0.90 THEN 100
252                     WHEN cache_ratio < 0.20 AND input_tokens >= 50000 THEN 80
253                     WHEN total_tokens >= 100000 THEN 70
254                     ELSE 0
255                 END
256             ), 0) AS max_recommendation_score,
257             CASE
258                 WHEN MAX(context_window_percent) >= 0.90 THEN 'high_context_use'
259                 WHEN MIN(cache_ratio) < 0.20 AND MAX(input_tokens) >= 50000
260                     THEN 'low_cache_reuse'
261                 WHEN MAX(total_tokens) >= 100000 THEN 'large_calls'
262                 ELSE NULL
263             END AS primary_recommendation,
264             CASE
265                 WHEN SUM(
266                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
267                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
268                 ) > SUM(
269                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
270                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
271                 )
272                     THEN 'mostly_codex'
273                 WHEN SUM(
274                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
275                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
276                 ) > SUM(
277                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
278                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
279                 )
280                     THEN 'mostly_user'
281                 WHEN SUM(
282                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
283                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
284                 ) = COUNT(*)
285                     THEN 'unknown'
286                 ELSE 'mixed'
287             END AS call_initiator_summary,
288             SUM(CASE WHEN coalesce(is_archived, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
289                 AS archived_call_count,
290             ? AS updated_at
291         FROM usage_events
292         {where_clause}
293         GROUP BY {thread_key_expr}
294         """,
295         [scope, updated_at, *params],
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
